s1.ptxt: Connect SUZUKI scan tool to DLC (1) located on underside of instrument panel at driver’s seat side.
Clear DTC according to instructions displayed on SUZUKI scan tool. Refer to SUZUKI scan tool operator’s manual for further details.
Perform DTC Check and confirm that normal DTC (NO CODES) is displayed and not malfunction DTC after completing clearance.
Set ignition OFF, and disconnect SUZUKI scan tool from DLC.

attention3.ptxt: If DTC B1013, B1021, B1024 or B1025, B1026, B1028, B1029 or DTC B1222 is stored in SDM, it is not possible to clear DTC.
